toolUseResult.originalFile:
<materialDesign:DialogHost
    x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:materialDesign="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes"
    xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
    Title="Weld Monitor V2"
    Width="1024" Height="768"
    WindowState="Normal"
    WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    ResizeMode="NoResize"
    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Background}"
    TextElement.Foreground="{DynamicResource MaterialDesignBody}"
    FontFamily="Malgun Gothic">

    <DockPanel>
        <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Left" Width="56"
                Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
            <StackPanel>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             IsChecked="True" Padding="12" Margin="0,8,0,0"
                             ToolTip="Monitor">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="MonitorDashboard" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="JIG Setup">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Cog" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Daily Check">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ClipboardCheck" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Search">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Raw Data">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ChartLine" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Settings">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="TuneVariant" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>

                <Separator Margin="8,12"/>

                <!-- Status LEDs -->
                <StackPanel Margin="0,4,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledPLC" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="PLC"/>
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledArduino" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="Arduino"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="64"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="200"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- TOP: KPI BAR -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Margin="4,4,4,0"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}"
                    CornerRadius="8">
                <Grid Margin="12,0">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- AMP -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="CURRENT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtAmp" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#4FC3F7"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" A" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- VOLT -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="VOLTAGE" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVolt" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#81C784"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" V" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- FLOW -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="GAS FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtFlow" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#FFB74D"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" L" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Status -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" VerticalAlignment="Center" Width="150">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtJig" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="STEP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtStep" Text="0" FontSize="13"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtResult" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- MIDDLE: Image + 3 Graphs -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="4,4,4,4">
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="240"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- JIG Image -->
                <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                        Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <TextBlock Text="JIG IMAGE" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                        <Image x:Name="imgJig" Grid.Row="1" Stretch="Uniform" Margin="8"
                               RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- 3 Graphs -->
                <Grid Grid.Column="1">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Border Grid.Row="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="AMP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartAmp" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="1" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="VOLT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartVolt" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="2" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2,0,0"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartFlow" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Grid>

            <!-- BOTTOM: DataGrid -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" Margin="4,0,4,4" CornerRadius="8"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Text="INSPECTION RESULT" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                    <DataGrid x:Name="dgResult" Grid.Row="1"
                              AutoGenerateColumns="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                              HeadersVisibility="Column" GridLinesVisibility="Horizontal"
                              Margin="4,2,4,4" FontSize="12" RowHeight="26" ColumnHeaderHeight="28">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="50"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Result" Binding="{Binding Result}" Width="55"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Avg" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>

<Window
    x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:materialDesign="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes"
    xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
    Title="Weld Monitor V2"
    Width="1024" Height="768"
    WindowState="Normal"
    WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    ResizeMode="NoResize"
    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Background}"
    TextElement.Foreground="{DynamicResource MaterialDesignBody}"
    FontFamily="Malgun Gothic">

    <DockPanel>
        <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Left" Width="56"
                Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
            <StackPanel>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             IsChecked="True" Padding="12" Margin="0,8,0,0"
                             ToolTip="Monitor">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="MonitorDashboard" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="JIG Setup">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Cog" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Daily Check">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ClipboardCheck" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Search">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Raw Data">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ChartLine" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Settings">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="TuneVariant" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>

                <Separator Margin="8,12"/>

                <!-- Status LEDs -->
                <StackPanel Margin="0,4,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledPLC" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="PLC"/>
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledArduino" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="Arduino"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="64"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="200"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- TOP: KPI BAR -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Margin="4,4,4,0"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}"
                    CornerRadius="8">
                <Grid Margin="12,0">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- AMP -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="CURRENT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtAmp" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#4FC3F7"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" A" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- VOLT -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="VOLTAGE" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVolt" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#81C784"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" V" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- FLOW -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="GAS FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtFlow" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#FFB74D"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" L" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Status -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" VerticalAlignment="Center" Width="150">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtJig" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="STEP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtStep" Text="0" FontSize="13"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtResult" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- MIDDLE: Image + 3 Graphs -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="4,4,4,4">
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="240"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- JIG Image -->
                <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                        Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <TextBlock Text="JIG IMAGE" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                        <Image x:Name="imgJig" Grid.Row="1" Stretch="Uniform" Margin="8"
                               RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- 3 Graphs -->
                <Grid Grid.Column="1">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Border Grid.Row="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="AMP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartAmp" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="1" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="VOLT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartVolt" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="2" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2,0,0"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartFlow" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Grid>

            <!-- BOTTOM: DataGrid -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" Margin="4,0,4,4" CornerRadius="8"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Text="INSPECTION RESULT" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                    <DataGrid x:Name="dgResult" Grid.Row="1"
                              AutoGenerateColumns="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                              HeadersVisibility="Column" GridLinesVisibility="Horizontal"
                              Margin="4,2,4,4" FontSize="12" RowHeight="26" ColumnHeaderHeight="28">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="50"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Result" Binding="{Binding Result}" Width="55"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Avg" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Max" Binding="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Min" Binding="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Avg" Binding="{Binding VoltAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Max" Binding="{Binding VoltMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="FLOW Avg" Binding="{Binding FlowAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Time" Binding="{Binding TimeElapsed, StringFormat=F1}" Width="55"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</materialDesign:DialogHost>

<Window
    x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:materialDesign="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes"
    xmlns:scottPlot="clr-namespace:ScottPlot.WPF;assembly=ScottPlot.WPF"
    Title="Weld Monitor V2"
    Width="1024" Height="768"
    WindowState="Normal"
    WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    ResizeMode="NoResize"
    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Background}"
    TextElement.Foreground="{DynamicResource MaterialDesignBody}"
    FontFamily="Malgun Gothic">

    <DockPanel>
        <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Left" Width="56"
                Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
            <StackPanel>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             IsChecked="True" Padding="12" Margin="0,8,0,0"
                             ToolTip="Monitor">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="MonitorDashboard" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="JIG Setup">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Cog" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Daily Check">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ClipboardCheck" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Search">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Raw Data">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ChartLine" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Settings">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="TuneVariant" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>

                <Separator Margin="8,12"/>

                <!-- Status LEDs -->
                <StackPanel Margin="0,4,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledPLC" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="PLC"/>
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledArduino" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="Arduino"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="64"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="200"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- TOP: KPI BAR -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Margin="4,4,4,0"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}"
                    CornerRadius="8">
                <Grid Margin="12,0">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- AMP -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="CURRENT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtAmp" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#4FC3F7"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" A" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- VOLT -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="VOLTAGE" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVolt" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#81C784"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" V" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- FLOW -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="GAS FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtFlow" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#FFB74D"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" L" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Status -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" VerticalAlignment="Center" Width="150">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtJig" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="STEP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtStep" Text="0" FontSize="13"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtResult" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- MIDDLE: Image + 3 Graphs -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="4,4,4,4">
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="240"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- JIG Image -->
                <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                        Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <TextBlock Text="JIG IMAGE" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                        <Image x:Name="imgJig" Grid.Row="1" Stretch="Uniform" Margin="8"
                               RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- 3 Graphs -->
                <Grid Grid.Column="1">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Border Grid.Row="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="AMP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartAmp" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="1" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="VOLT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartVolt" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="2" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2,0,0"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartFlow" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Grid>

            <!-- BOTTOM: DataGrid -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" Margin="4,0,4,4" CornerRadius="8"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Text="INSPECTION RESULT" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                    <DataGrid x:Name="dgResult" Grid.Row="1"
                              AutoGenerateColumns="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                              HeadersVisibility="Column" GridLinesVisibility="Horizontal"
                              Margin="4,2,4,4" FontSize="12" RowHeight="26" ColumnHeaderHeight="28">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="50"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Result" Binding="{Binding Result}" Width="55"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Avg" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Max" Binding="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Min" Binding="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Avg" Binding="{Binding VoltAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Max" Binding="{Binding VoltMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="FLOW Avg" Binding="{Binding FlowAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Time" Binding="{Binding TimeElapsed, StringFormat=F1}" Width="55"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</Window>

<Window
    x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:materialDesign="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes"
    xmlns:scottPlot="clr-namespace:ScottPlot.WPF;assembly=ScottPlot.WPF"
    Title="Weld Monitor V2"
    Width="1024" Height="768"
    WindowState="Normal"
    WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    ResizeMode="NoResize"
    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Background}"
    TextElement.Foreground="{DynamicResource MaterialDesignBody}"
    FontFamily="Malgun Gothic">

    <DockPanel>
        <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Left" Width="56"
                Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
            <StackPanel>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             IsChecked="True" Padding="12" Margin="0,8,0,0"
                             ToolTip="Monitor">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="MonitorDashboard" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="JIG Setup">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Cog" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Daily Check">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ClipboardCheck" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Search">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Raw Data">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ChartLine" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>
                <RadioButton Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignTabRadioButtonLeft}"
                             Padding="12" ToolTip="Settings">
                    <materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="TuneVariant" Width="24" Height="24"/>
                </RadioButton>

                <Separator Margin="8,12"/>

                <!-- Status LEDs -->
                <StackPanel Margin="0,4,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledPLC" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="PLC"/>
                    <Ellipse x:Name="ledArduino" Width="10" Height="10" Fill="#555" Margin="0,6"
                             ToolTip="Arduino"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="64"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="200"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- TOP: KPI BAR -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Margin="4,4,4,0"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}"
                    CornerRadius="8">
                <Grid Margin="12,0">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- AMP -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="CURRENT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtAmp" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#4FC3F7"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" A" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- VOLT -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="VOLTAGE" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVolt" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#81C784"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" V" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- FLOW -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="GAS FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtFlow" Text="0.00" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                                       Foreground="#FFB74D"/>
                            <TextBlock Text=" L" FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                                       Margin="0,0,0,4" Opacity="0.5"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Status -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" VerticalAlignment="Center" Width="150">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtJig" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="STEP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtStep" Text="0" FontSize="13"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.6" Width="36"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtResult" Text="--" FontSize="13" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- MIDDLE: Image + 3 Graphs -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="4,4,4,4">
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="240"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- JIG Image -->
                <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                        Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <TextBlock Text="JIG IMAGE" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                        <Image x:Name="imgJig" Grid.Row="1" Stretch="Uniform" Margin="8"
                               RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- 3 Graphs -->
                <Grid Grid.Column="1">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Border Grid.Row="0" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="AMP" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <scottPlot:WpfPlot x:Name="chartAmp" Margin="0,16,0,0"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="1" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="VOLT" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <scottPlot:WpfPlot x:Name="chartVolt" Margin="0,16,0,0"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <Border Grid.Row="2" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,2,0,0"
                            Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                        <Grid>
                            <TextBlock Text="FLOW" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.4" Margin="8,4,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Top"/>
                            <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chartFlow" Margin="0,16,0,0"
                                                AnimationsSpeed="00:00:00.0" TooltipPosition="Hidden"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Grid>

            <!-- BOTTOM: DataGrid -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" Margin="4,0,4,4" CornerRadius="8"
                    Background="{DynamicResource MaterialDesign.Brush.Card}">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <TextBlock Text="INSPECTION RESULT" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" Margin="10,6,0,0"/>
                    <DataGrid x:Name="dgResult" Grid.Row="1"
                              AutoGenerateColumns="False" IsReadOnly="True"
                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False"
                              HeadersVisibility="Column" GridLinesVisibility="Horizontal"
                              Margin="4,2,4,4" FontSize="12" RowHeight="26" ColumnHeaderHeight="28">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Point" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="50"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Result" Binding="{Binding Result}" Width="55"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Avg" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Max" Binding="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP Min" Binding="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Avg" Binding="{Binding VoltAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT Max" Binding="{Binding VoltMax, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="FLOW Avg" Binding="{Binding FlowAvg, StringFormat=F2}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="Time" Binding="{Binding TimeElapsed, StringFormat=F1}" Width="55"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </DockPanel>
</Window>

message.content: 봤음 이런 ui 디자인 전문으로하는 llm 뭐 있나

content.text:
UI 전문 AI 도구:

| 도구 | 특징 | WPF 활용 |
|------|------|---------|
| **v0.dev** (Vercel) | UI 생성 전문, React/Tailwind | 디자인 참고 → XAML 변환 |
| **Galileo AI** | 프롬프트 → UI 목업 생성 | 레이아웃/색상 참고 |
| **Lovable** | 풀스택 앱 UI 생성 | 웹 기반, 참고용 |

근데 솔직히 **WPF XAML 직접 생성**하는 AI는 없습니다. 다 웹(React/HTML) 기반이라.

**현실적인 방법:**
1. **v0.dev**에서 "industrial monitoring dashboard dark theme 1024x768" 프롬프트로 디자인 뽑고
2. 그 스크린샷/레이아웃을 여기서 XAML로 변환

아니면 Dribbble/Behance에서 "SCADA dashboard" "industrial HMI dark" 검색해서 마음에 드는 거 캡처하면 그대로 구현해드릴 수도 있고요.

v0.dev 한번 써볼까요?

message.content: ㅇㅇ

input.query: select:WebFetch

content.text:
v0.dev는 로그인이 필요해서 제가 직접 접근이 안 됩니다. 대신 프롬프트를 드릴게요.

**v0.dev에서 입력할 프롬프트:**

```
Create an industrial weld monitoring dashboard with dark theme, fixed size 1024x768px.

Layout:
- Left: narrow icon sidebar (56px) with 6 navigation icons + 2 status LED dots
- Top: KPI bar showing 3 large values (CURRENT 245.3A in light blue, VOLTAGE 23.1V in green, GAS FLOW 18.2L in orange) + JIG/STEP/Result status
- Middle-left: JIG image panel (240px wide)
- Middle-right: 3 stacked real-time line charts (AMP/VOLT/FLOW) with colored lines on dark background
- Bottom: data table grid showing inspection results (Point, Result OK/NG, AMP Avg/Max/Min, VOLT Avg, FLOW Avg, Time)

Style: Material Design dark, rounded cards with subtle borders, minimal, professional industrial HMI feel. Background #1e1e1e, cards #2b2b2b.
```

이거 복사해서 [v0.dev](https://v0.dev)에 붙여넣으면 됩니다.

그 사이에 Dribbble에서 참고할 디자인도 찾아볼까요?

<analysis>
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. User starts in WELD_MONITOR3_IAM project directory, mentions needing to connect LS PLC XGT XGL-EFMTB.

2. I investigated the project - found it's a .NET Framework 4.8 WinForms app that had MELSEC PLC code removed (IAM-specific), currently Arduino IO only.

3. User asked about XGT FEnet performance - I estimated 100-200Hz possible, 50-100Hz practical for 8 words in/out.

4. User asked about implementation approach - I proposed XgtFEnetHelper with direct TCP socket implementation.

5. User mentioned HSL (HslCommunication) library - I searched and found it has paid (original) and free (Community LGPL) versions. User corrected me that the free version exists.

6. User asked where to get it - NuGet only has paid version, Community is GitHub-only. Decided to implement directly instead.

7. User said to use manual for accuracy, check GitHub for LS-related open source repos. Found VagabondK.Protocols (C# LGPL, FEnet support) and official LS Electric manuals.

8. User agreed to use VagabondK source + official manual for implementation.

9. User asked about manual file storage location - established convention: `G:/공유 드라이브/UTILITY/Manual/`. Updated CLAUDE.md and manual-import skill.

10. User provided signal list for PLC:
    - IN: 차종신호 LH (word), 차종신호 RH (word), 로봇포지션 LH/RH (bit), 용접시작 (bit), 노즐클리닝완료 (bit), 원위치완료 (bit)
    - OUT: 용접포인트카운터 (word), PC이상없음 heartbeat (bit), 용접NG (bit), 일상점검완료 (bit), 작업표준서확인완료 (bit)

11. User confirmed we define the PLC address layout. Proposed word-based arrays with bit access helpers.

12. User said go with 100 words. I implemented:
    - XgtFEnetHelper.cs - TCP XGT FEnet protocol
    - GlobalValues.cs - PLC static class with In[100]/Out[100], PLC settings
    - Configuration.cs - PLC PropertyGrid settings
    - Build succeeded (0 errors, 5 warnings)

13. User then expressed desire for better UI - asked about WPF. I advised against converting existing project, suggested alternatives.

14. User decided to create new WPF project at WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2 on desktop.

15. Created .NET 9 WPF project with MaterialDesignThemes, tried LiveCharts2 (failed .NET 9 compat), switched to ScottPlot.WPF.

16. Built MainWindow.xaml with Material dark theme: sidebar + KPI bar + JIG image + 3 graphs + DataGrid. Fixed several build errors (DialogHost vs Window, ScottPlot 5.1 API changes).

17. App ran successfully with demo data.

18. User asked about UI-specialized LLMs. I suggested v0.dev, Galileo AI.

19. User said "ㅇㅇ" (yes) to v0.dev. I explained v0.dev requires login, provided a prompt.

20. User's LAST message: "지금 개발 폴더에 10가지 안으로 뽑아서 이미지 파일로 저장해줘라" - asking me to generate 10 design variations and save as image files in the dev folder. Then the compaction request came.

Key files:
- XgtFEnetHelper.cs (new) - XGT FEnet TCP protocol
- GlobalValues.cs (modified) - PLC class, PLC settings
- Configuration.cs (modified) - PLC PropertyGrid  
- WeldMonitor3.csproj (modified) - added XgtFEnetHelper.cs
- CLAUDE.md global (modified) - Device Manuals section
- manual-import.md (modified) - PDF copy to GDrive rule
- WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2/ (new project) - WPF .NET 9
  - App.xaml - Material dark theme
  - MainWindow.xaml - Full layout
  - MainWindow.xaml.cs - ScottPlot charts + demo data
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Connect LS Electric XGT XGL-EFMTB PLC to WELD_MONITOR3_IAM project via FEnet (Ethernet TCP) protocol
   - Implement XGT FEnet communication helper with block read/write (100 words each for IN/OUT)
   - PLC signal mapping: IN has 2 words (차종 LH/RH) + 5 bits (로봇포지션, 용접시작, 노즐클리닝, 원위치), OUT has 1 word (포인트카운터) + 4 bits (heartbeat, NG, 일상점검, 작업표준서)
   - Establish device manual storage convention: `G:/공유 드라이브/UTILITY/Manual/`
   - Create new WPF .NET 9 project (WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2) as UI redesign of the existing WinForms app
   - User wants to use v0.dev or similar tool for UI design inspiration, asked to generate 10 design variations as image files in the dev folder

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - LS Electric XGT FEnet TCP protocol (port 2004, "LSIS-XGT" header, continuous block read/write)
   - Protocol frame: 20-byte header + data frame (command 0x0054=read, 0x0058=write, datatype 0x0014=continuous)
   - Max block size: 200 words per block
   - 3-step polling cycle: Read IN block → Read OUT block → Write OUT block (~9ms/cycle = 100Hz)
   - Word-based PLC arrays with bit access helpers (GetBit/SetBit)
   - WPF .NET 9 with MaterialDesignThemes + ScottPlot.WPF + CommunityToolkit.Mvvm
   - VagabondK.Protocols (GitHub, LGPL) as protocol reference
   - HslCommunication: paid original vs free Community (LGPL) version — decided to implement directly
   - Target display: 1024x768 fixed resolution

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **WELD_MONITOR3_IAM project (existing WinForms):**

   - `XgtFEnetHelper.cs` (NEW - 190 lines)
     - XGT FEnet TCP communication: Connect, Disconnect, ReadWords, WriteWords
     - Binary protocol: LSIS-XGT header (20 bytes), continuous read (CMD 0x0054), continuous write (CMD 0x0058)
     - Thread-safe with lock, auto-disconnect on error, LastError property
     ```csharp
     public class XgtFEnetHelper
     {
         private TcpClient _client;
         private NetworkStream _stream;
         private readonly object _lock = new object();
         private ushort _invokeId;
         private static readonly byte[] COMPANY_ID = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes("LSIS-XGT");
         private const byte CPU_XGK = 0xA0;
         private const byte SRC_CLIENT = 0x33;
         private const ushort CMD_READ = 0x0054;
         private const ushort CMD_WRITE = 0x0058;
         // ... ReadWords, WriteWords with header building and response parsing
     }
     ```

   - `GlobalValues.cs` (MODIFIED)
     - Added `PLC` static class with In[100]/Out[100] arrays, GetBit/SetBit/SetWord/GetOutSnapshot helpers
     - Added PLC settings: plcEnabled, plcIpAddress, plcPort, plcReadAddress, plcReadCount, plcWriteAddress, plcWriteCount, plcPollingMs
     - Added INI load/save for [PLC] section
     ```csharp
     public static class PLC
     {
         public const int MAX_WORDS = 100;
         public static readonly int[] In = new int[MAX_WORDS];
         public static readonly int[] Out = new int[MAX_WORDS];
         private static readonly object _outLock = new object();
         public static bool GetBit(int[] arr, int wordIdx, int bitIdx) => (arr[wordIdx] >> bitIdx & 1) == 1;
         public static void SetBit(int wordIdx, int bitIdx, bool value) { ... }
         public static void SetWord(int wordIdx, int value) { ... }
         public static int[] GetOutSnapshot() { ... }
     }
     ```

   - `Configuration.cs` (MODIFIED)
     - Added PLC 통신 category with 8 properties (Enabled, IP, Port, ReadAddress, ReadCount, WriteAddress, WriteCount, PollingMs)
     - PlcEnabledConverter (use/not use dropdown)
     - PLC detail settings hidden when disabled via GetProperties filter
     - Apply() validates counts (1-200) and polling (10-1000ms)

   - `WeldMonitor3.csproj` (MODIFIED) - Added `<Compile Include="XgtFEnetHelper.cs" />`

   - `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` (MODIFIED) - Added `## Device Manuals` section: `G:/공유 드라이브/UTILITY/Manual/`
   - `~/.claude/commands/manual-import.md` (MODIFIED) - Added rule to copy PDF to Google Drive Manual folder
   - `G:/공유 드라이브/UTILITY/Manual/` folder created

   **WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2 project (new WPF .NET 9):**

   - `WeldMonitorV2.csproj` - .NET 9 WPF with MaterialDesignThemes 5.3.0, ScottPlot.WPF 5.1.57, CommunityToolkit.Mvvm 8.4.0

   - `App.xaml` - Material Design dark theme (BaseTheme="Dark", PrimaryColor="Blue", SecondaryColor="Teal")

   - `MainWindow.xaml` - Full 1024x768 layout:
     - Left sidebar (56px) with 6 RadioButton icons + 2 status LED Ellipses
     - Top KPI bar: AMP (light blue #4FC3F7), VOLT (green #81C784), FLOW (orange #FFB74D) + JIG/STEP/Result
     - Middle: JIG Image (240px) + 3 stacked ScottPlot charts
     - Bottom: DataGrid with inspection result columns (200px height)

   - `MainWindow.xaml.cs` - Chart styling (dark mode, card background #2b2b2b) + demo data (waveforms, KPI values, grid rows)
     ```csharp
     private static void StyleChart(ScottPlot.WPF.WpfPlot chart, string yLabel)
     {
         var plt = chart.Plot;
         var cardBg = new ScottPlot.Color(43, 43, 43);
         plt.FigureBackground.Color = cardBg;
         plt.DataBackground.Color = cardBg;
         plt.Grid.MajorLineColor = new ScottPlot.Color(60, 60, 60);
         plt.Axes.Bottom.IsVisible = false;
         plt.Axes.Left.TickLabelStyle.ForeColor = new ScottPlot.Color(120, 120, 120);
         chart.UserInputProcessor.IsEnabled = false;
     }
     ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **LiveCharts2 .NET 9 incompatibility**: `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc6.1` failed with MC1000 "Could not find assembly 'LiveChartsCore'". Fixed by replacing with `ScottPlot.WPF 5.1.57`.
   - **DialogHost has no Title property**: Using `materialDesign:DialogHost` as root element caused MC3072. Fixed by changing to `Window` as root element.
   - **ScottPlot 5.1 deprecated API**: `plt.Style.DarkMode()` and `plt.Style.Background()` deprecated, `chart.Interaction.Disable()` not found. Fixed with `plt.FigureBackground.Color`, `plt.DataBackground.Color`, `chart.UserInputProcessor.IsEnabled = false`.
   - **HslCommunication licensing confusion**: Initially said it was paid, user corrected. Found Community (LGPL) version exists on GitHub but not on NuGet. Decided to implement protocol directly.

5. Problem Solving:
   - XGT FEnet protocol implementation: Referenced VagabondK.Protocols source + official LS Electric manuals for byte-level frame structure
   - PLC signal mapping: Mixed word/bit signals solved with word-array approach + bit access helpers
   - UI modernization: WinForms limitations → decided new WPF .NET 9 project for UI redesign, keeping existing WinForms project for production
   - Chart library selection: LiveCharts2 incompatible with .NET 9, ScottPlot.WPF works

6. All user messages:
   - "PLC_XGT XGL_EFMTB LS 산전 피엘시랑 연결해야할듯한데.."

   - "그렇게 하도록 하세요.메뉴얼 파일은 어디다 보내기로 했었는데.."
   - "구글드라이브 util 폴더에 manual 폴더 만들어서 거기 저장하게 명시하자"
   - Signal list (IN: 차종LH/RH word, 로봇포지션LH/RH bit, 용접시작 bit, 노즐클리닝 bit, 원위치 bit / OUT: 용접포인트카운터 word, PC이상없음 bit, 용접NG bit, 일상점검완료 bit, 작업표준서확인 bit)
